section_name: Alternative Testing Methodology for Certain Counties
text: The commission by rule may establish procedures for testing and enforcing vehicle emissions standards by use of alternative testing methodology that meets or exceeds United States Environmental Protection Agency requirements in a county participating in an early action compact under Subchapter H (Definitions) , Chapter 382 (Clean Air Act) , Health and Safety Code.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 548. Inspection of Vehicles
##### § 548.307 — Alternative Testing Methodology for Certain Counties

The commission by rule may establish procedures for testing and enforcing vehicle emissions standards by use of alternative testing methodology that meets or exceeds United States Environmental Protection Agency requirements in a county participating in an early action compact under Subchapter H (Definitions) , Chapter 382 (Clean Air Act) , Health and Safety Code.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 203, Sec. 5, eff. June 10, 2003.*
